observations: RSRP of -58.0 dBm is within the acceptable range for antenna end testing (-75 to -50 dBm). SINR of 30.0 dB exceeds the minimum threshold of 25 dB indicating excellent signal quality. DL throughput of 285.4 Mbps meets expectations for LTE 20 MHz MIMO configuration.
recommendations: Continue monitoring DL throughput during peak hours to confirm sustained performance. Verify UL throughput consistency across all sectors. No immediate corrective action required.
kpi_impact: VoLTE MOS expected to remain above 3.8 with current SINR levels. RRC setup success rate projected above 99.5%. No negative impact on E-RAB establishment anticipated.
